ab: makaya ken a kisedjam tua su paisu?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: ui makaya! makudakuda a su kisedjamen?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: maljim anga ken a masipaisu, makaya ken a kisedjam tua su paisu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎？
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ini a ken a namasi paisu auta!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: dremaudrav anga ken a kemasi paisu, maqati a ken a kisedjam tua su paisu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎？
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ini a maqati, a su kinisedjam ka sitjaisangas a paisu inikanan a su valiti a ken.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: makaya a ken a kisedjam tua su itung?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: makaya, sau alapu tisun a macidilj.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: makaya a ken a kisedjam tua su laqulj?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: ku sinipasedjam anga tjai Vais.
en: B: I lent it to Vais.

ab: pasedjaman tjanuaken a su tjukutjuku ui?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: ui nanguaq, ljakua pacikelu anga nu tiyaw tjanuaken.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: qemudjalj anga, ini aken a namasi kausua, pasedjami a ken tua kusua ui?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎？
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: ita a kausua a ku kinacu, tja kiljaljaungai!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧！
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: aicu a su sinipasedjam ka tjaisangas a ljaqulj tjanuaken, ku pacikelaw tjanusun.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: sa pacun anan sun tua anema nu ljaquljan makaya ken a su pasemalavan.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: ki nungida ken a venalid tua su paisu?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: inika makuda, valitu anga nu izuanga su paisu.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: nungida anga sun a semu kiyam tua ku paisu?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: ku sukiyamai anga sun nu tiyaw. ku valitai anga sun nu tiyaw.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: nungida anga su pacikelen a ku ljaqulj?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: ku pinacikel anga tjatiyaw tjanusun ayaken?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎？
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: sini pasedjam cu a inepic ni Kasi tjanusun?
en: A: Did Kasi lend you this pen?

ab: ui, ku kinisedjam tucu tjaimadju.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: su kinisedjam cu a inepic tjai Kasi?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Kasi?

ab: ini, vineli cu ni kina.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: nekanga nu qatia, sau kisedjamu tjai Balu tua qatia.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Balu.

ab: ui, vaik a ken a kisedjam.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: sau sukiyami a ku paisu ayau ti Saunuyaw.
en: B: Go and ask Sauniyaw to return my money.

ab: pida a kiyam nimadju tjanusun?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
